subject: [PATCH v3 02/28] filelock: add support for ignoring deleg breaks for dir change events

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds support to ignore delegation breaks on directory change events in NFS clients. It introduces a new flags parameter to the try_break_deleg function and modifies the __break_lease function to ignore certain types of delegation break events. This allows the client to be notified of directory changes after the fact, rather than having the server recall the delegation.
